criteria.pass: Exactly one reference playbook was read; topic is in the 12-value enum.
criteria.fail: Two or more playbooks opened, or topic guessed under ambiguity.

criteria.pass: Missing evidence, unreadable asset, or undecidable input yields block/fail/blocked/not_verified.
criteria.fail: Any pass/allow emitted without provable safety.

criteria.pass: Every claim carries one Alfa-core tag; single family throughout.
criteria.fail: Untagged claim or mixed tag families.

criteria.pass: No pass while any required check is fail/blocked; no allow without evidence; no block without reason; checks array non-empty.
criteria.fail: pass with unmet criterion or empty checks array.

criteria.pass: Named validator + check.sh run on positive and negative fixtures; re-run reproduces the packet.
criteria.fail: Verdict authored by hand or depending on clock/network/model/random.

criteria.pass: All findings referenced by path:line + masked token (<=4 prefix chars).
criteria.fail: Any unmasked secret value in the verdict or logs.

criteria.pass: All violations reported in one pass with exact, actionable repairs.
criteria.fail: Run stops at the first failure, or repairs are vague.

criteria.pass: The decision names the policy/gate rule that governs it.
criteria.fail: Verdict given with no rule citation.
